eval: per-patient 5-fold CV over 631 longitudinal records (leak-free: eye-disjoint folds + causal past->future ordering)
method: LongitudinalVFModel = persistence on follow-up visits (prior VF) + fundus long_global on first visits; encoder-decoder + Garway-Heath intact. Equivalent deterministic blend = 3.752.
honest_notes: Beats fundus-only (4.29) and meets the firm <=3.9 target; sits at the sub-3.74 boundary.
Follow-up stratum is noise-floor-bounded (2.76) -> persistence is unbeatable there; the learned delta adds ~nothing.
First-visit stratum (4.55) is the bottleneck; the disc structure-function lever is the remaining (marginal) way to push clearly sub-3.74.
ARVO framing must lead with the persistence baseline (3.71) and disclose 42% of records are first-visit/fundus-only.
